---
name: "Security Audit"
description: "Run a security-focused review of code changes"
---

Perform a security audit on the provided code.

Check for:
- SQL injection vulnerabilities
- Cross-site scripting (XSS) potential
- Authentication/authorization bypasses
- Sensitive data exposure (API keys, tokens, PII)
- Insecure direct object references
- Missing input validation
- Hardcoded credentials

For each finding, include CVE/CWE references where applicable.
